archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) optimized for Dark Tech/SaaS E-commerce

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-white
scale.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-blue-400

layout_spacing.grid_products: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 sm:gap-6

ui_components.navbar: Glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B1F3A]/80 border-b border-white/5`). Sticky to top. Must contain logo and navigation links.
ui_components.hero: Deep navy background with abstract blue neon overlay. Center-aligned text. H1 'Digital Hypebeast'. Subtext on top-up & services. Primary CTA 'Top Up Sekarang'. Include Live Counter simulation.
ui_components.live_counter: Small badge in Hero: '🔴 1273 transaksi sukses hari ini'. Animate the dot with ping.
ui_components.product_cards: Aspect ratio 3:4 or 4:5 for game covers. Soft shadow (`shadow-xl shadow-black/40`), hover to scale up (`hover:scale-105 transition-transform`). Include 'Beli Sekarang' button overlay on hover.
ui_components.services_bento: SaaS clean bento layout. 3 blocks: Website Development, IT Consultation, UI/UX Design. Use `bg-[#112A4F]` with 1px `border-white/10`.
ui_components.why_choose_us: Section featuring the specific badges: 'Trusted Digital Service', '1000+ Transaksi Berhasil', 'Layanan 24/7'. Use Lucide icons.
ui_components.testimonials: Avatars with names: Andi, Budi, Rina. Simple elegant dark cards.
ui_components.transactions_table: Shadcn Table component. Fake recent transactions. Compact and sleek, text-sm.
ui_components.checkout_popup: Shadcn Dialog. Step 1: Input Game ID (Shadcn Input). Step 2: Select Nominal (Grid of buttons). Step 3: Payment Method (Grid of logos). Loading spinner on submit -> Success State.
ui_components.floating_telegram: Fixed bottom right. Z-index 50. Large Telegram icon with `animate-pulse` and brand blue color. Link to @DigitalHypebeast
ui_components.toast_notifications: Fixed bottom left. 'Recent activity' fake transactions appearing every 5-8s. Use Sonner or custom Framer Motion div.

motion_and_effects.framer_motion: Wrap sections in staggered fade-up animations.
motion_and_effects.hover_states: Buttons must lighten on hover (`hover:bg-blue-400`). Cards should lift slightly (`-translate-y-1`) with a glowing drop shadow (`hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(30,144,255,0.3)]`).

technical_rules.components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structure. Use Shadcn for Form inputs, Dialogs (Checkout), and Tables (Transactions).
technical_rules.accessibility: Contrast must pass APCA. Dark navy vs white text is good. Ensure focus states use `ring-2 ring-brand_blue`.
